title: mentha × rotundifolia f. lepteilema
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. lepteilema, also known as Peppermint, is a natural hybrid of watermint (Mentha aquatica) and spearmint (Mentha spicata). It is a perennial herb renowned for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of menthol and menthone, which have been used to alleviate digestive issues and provide relief from nausea and headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia f. lepteilema include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and a potential reduction in stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as tea, essential oil, and capsules, which can be easily incorporated into a daily health routine.
